claims.summary: Reconnect is an expected part of the telemetry lane rather than an exceptional afterthought.
claims.disposition: Verified current connection epochs, backoff, protocol, and freshness evidence plus mock-WebSocket tests.

claims.summary: RwLock contention may create a delayed sense of now.
claims.disposition: Verified current source measures pipeline, lock wait, and lock hold separately and does not infer causation from timing alone.

claims.summary: First-packet latency and shutdown during mode packing should be tested.
claims.disposition: Routed to bounded mock-socket fixtures; no live shutdown or pressure event will be induced.

claims.summary: A dedicated mpsc state owner should replace shared RwLock updates.
claims.disposition: Routed as a contingent architecture comparison; implementation requires observed contention, parity tests, and restart alignment rather than assumption.
